title: Pang Yinbao, deputy secretary-general of the Qinhuangdao Municipal People's Government, visited Tianhui Group for inspection and research
contentHtml:
On the morning of October 19, Pang Yinbao, deputy secretary-general of the Qinhuangdao Municipal People's Government, led Yang Zhongquan, deputy director of the Haigang District Government, and his delegation visited Tianhui Group for investigation. Du Shuang, President of Tianhui Plastic Group and heads of various departments of the group conducted theWarm reception.


At the symposium, Secretary-General Pang Yinbao fully affirmed the achievements and efforts of Tianhui Plastics Group. It focused on an in-depth discussion of the development and implementation of the Haojuntong project, the online freight platform of Tianhui Plastics Group, which was about to be launched, and made a clear explanation of the problems in the development of the platform, and gave guidance on the difficulties faced by the platform. The two parties exchanged views on national industrial policies and guidance, relevant project declarations, etc. Understand in detail the problems faced by enterprises in their development, formulate targeted solutions, and help enterprises solve problems as soon as possible. Secretary-General Pang Yinbao pointed out that he hoped that Tianhui Company would identify its own advantages, establish its own company image, and increase its influence.
titleZh: 秦皇岛市人民政府副秘书长庞印宝莅临天晖集团进行考察调研
contentHtmlZh:
10月19日上午，秦皇岛市人民政府副秘书长庞印宝带领海港区政府副区长杨忠权一行到访天晖集团进行调研。天晖塑料集团总裁杜霜及集团各部门负责人进行了热情接待。


座谈会上，庞印宝秘书长给予了天晖塑料集团所取得的成效和努力进行了充分的肯定。重点对天晖塑料集团即将上线的网络货运平台——皓俊通项目的开展及实施情况进行了深入探讨，针对平台发展中的问题做出明确的阐述，对平台面临的困难给予指导意见。双方就国家产业政策和导向、相关项目申报等进行了交流。详细了解企业发展中的难题，制定针对性解决方案，帮助企业早日解决难题。庞印宝秘书长指出希望天晖公司找准自己的优势点，树立自己的公司形象，提高影响力。
